name: CircuTech International Holdings Limited
summary: CircuTech International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the research and development, manufacture, marketing, and sale of video surveillance systems in Hong Kong, the United States, the Netherlands, Taiwan, and internationally. It is also involved in the distribution of third party IT products; and provision of repair, maintenance, and other support services for electronic products. The company was formerly known as TeleEye Holdings Limited and changed its name to CircuTech International Holdings Limited in August 2016. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong. CircuTech International Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Foxconn (Far East) Limited.
